data.title: Burnham Holdings, Inc. Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Financial Results; Net Sales Surge 18.7% to $66.2 Million
data.description: In 2025, Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) implemented strategic portfolio adjustments that led to a significant increase in profitability. The company reported a 36% rise in net income, with EBITDA reaching 9.7% of net sales. This improvement has positively impacted the financial performance of the company.

data.title: XCEL BRANDS Announces Super Star Chef Jenny Martinez to Premiere on HSN
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Xcel Brands (NASDAQ: XELB) revealed its partnership with renowned Latina celebrity chef Jenny Martinez to introduce the Mesa Mia by Jenny Martinez kitchen collection on HSN (The Home Shopping Network). This collaboration aims to bring consumers a line of kitchenware and authentic Latina cuisine, combining social commerce and live streaming for a unique shopping experience. The collection is set to launch on HSN on April 28, 2026, giving customers the opportunity to access Jenny Martinez's exclusive brand.
Total voting rights and share transactions reported; company buys back 50,000 shares.

data.title: Republic Power Group Limited Announces Strategic Investment and Technology Access Agreement to Enter High-Growth RWA Tokenization and Blockchain Infrastructure Markets
data.description: RPGL has initiated the initial phase of its enhanced digital asset strategy by completing a transaction that grants them an ownership interest in NVC Partners and access to high-quality RWA platform capabilities. The transaction occurred on April 27, 2026, in Singapore. RPGL, listed on NASDAQ as RPGL, took this step to strengthen its position in the digital asset market. This move signifies RPGL's commitment to expanding its presence in this sector and leveraging the expertise of NVC Partners.

data.title: Z Squared Provides Additional Information on Previously Disclosed Pro Rata Distribution
data.description: Z Squared, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZSQR) based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, shared additional details on its merger with Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. The company disclosed information on the pro rata dividend distribution linked to the deal. This update was made on April 27, 2026.

data.title: RJ Young Expands Strategic Partnership with Xerox to Serve Clients Across Tennessee, Mississippi, and West Virginia
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, RJ Young, a top office technology solutions and managed services provider, revealed a widened partnership with Xerox. As per the expanded agreement, RJ Young will extend technical services to all Xerox clients and offer sales support for SMB clients in Tennessee, Mississippi, and West Virginia. This move aims to bolster RJ Young’s service quality, technology solutions, and local presence.

data.title: Are OGN, RMAX, XOMA, REAX Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Those with insider status could potentially gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders cannot access. The planned deals might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the company to deliberate on their entitlements and alternatives without incurring any expenses.

data.title: Kroenke Sports & Entertainment Partners with Humanforce to Elevate the Workforce Experience at KSE Colorado Venues
data.description: Humanforce, a top global provider of AI-driven human capital management solutions, has partnered with Kroenke Sports & Entertainment (KSE) to enhance workforce management at KSE Colorado venues. This collaboration includes Ball Arena, hosting the Denver Nuggets and Colorado Avalanche, DICK’S Sporting Goods Park for the Colorado Rapids, and Paramount Theatre. This strategic partnership aims to optimize operations and enhance efficiency across these major venues.

data.title: Dr. Ranjan Rajbanshi Scholarship for Medical Students Announces New Opportunity to Support Future Healthcare Leaders
data.description: A unique scholarship program for undergraduates, led by Dr. Ranjan Rajbanshi, emphasizes academic achievement and career objectives in the fields of medicine and healthcare. Located in Santa Barbara, California, the program was announced on April 27, 2026. The scholarship, aimed at medical students, is currently open for applications.

data.title: Fresh Express® Brings Bold Flavor, Culinary Star Power, and Category Innovation to CPMA 2026
data.description: Fresh Express®, a top player in value-added salads, is gearing up for a standout presence at the Canadian Produce Marketing Association (CPMA) Annual event in Toronto on April 27, 2026. Boasting an immersive brand experience at Booth #709, the company will showcase new product launches and feature Antoni Porowski. By introducing cutting-edge offerings and engaging with attendees, Fresh Express® aims to make a significant impact in the industry.
